title: cyathea sunduei
intro: Cyathea sunduei, also known as a tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Cyatheaceae family and is native to the tropical forests of Madagascar. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea sunduei include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cyathea sunduei include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
